name: Dill Crock
recipeInstructions:
1. Make brine using 3/4 cup sea salt, 1/4 cup cider vinegar, and 10 cups water.
2. Slice onions, bell peppers, celery, carrots, and break cauliflower into florets.
3. Pack a layer of fresh dill and garlic at the bottom of the jar.
4. Cook green beans for 3 minutes and drain.
5. Layer all ingredients in the jar.
6. Top off with more fresh dill and garlic.
7. Cover with brine.
8. Place a small saucer weighted to keep everything below the brine.
9. Cure at room temperature for 10 days.
10. Refrigerate.
